name: skill-manager
description: Evidence-backed local inventory and safe cleanup for Agent Skills.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @skill-manager/core build && pnpm --filter agent-skills-audit build && pnpm --filter @skill-manager/desktop build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @skill-manager/core test && pnpm --filter agent-skills-audit test && pnpm --filter @skill-manager/desktop test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @skill-manager/core lint && pnpm --filter agent-skills-audit lint && pnpm --filter @skill-manager/desktop lint
scripts.package:all: pnpm package && pnpm package:linux && pnpm package:win
scripts.verify:release: pnpm checksums && pnpm verify:artifacts && pnpm verify:release-assets
scripts.release:local: pnpm release:check && pnpm cli:bundle && pnpm cli:pack && pnpm cli:verify-package && pnpm package:all && pnpm smoke:packaged && pnpm verify:release && pnpm release:dist
